title: Get started with Agentic Engineering
summary: Choose an entry point based on where the client is in its modernization and AI adoption journey.

cards.title: Executive strategy session
cards.description: A short advisory session to align on why agentic engineering matters, where it fits, and what outcomes to target.

cards.title: Foundation workshop
cards.description: A hands-on workshop to define the operating model, governance approach, and platform requirements.

cards.title: Implementation pilot
cards.description: A pilot modernization effort that proves the model in delivery with paired execution and capability transfer.

cards.title: Managed evolution
cards.description: Ongoing support for operations, governance tuning, enablement, and new modernization waves.

cards.title: AIS Virtual Architect
cards.description: Agent-driven architecture design that produces costed, deployable Azure plans aligned to MACC and ACR goals.
